title: Luxyle Luxury Interior Décor Store – Frontend Implementation

requirements.summary: Apply luxury premium theme with beige/ivory/white/gold/royal-blue palette and elegant serif fonts throughout the application
acceptanceCriteria: Color tokens for beige, ivory, white, gold, and royal blue are applied consistently across all sections
Cormorant Garamond is used for all headings and Jost for body text
Page scrolls smoothly when navigating between sections
No blue/purple accents appear outside the royal blue specification

file_operations.description: Update global CSS custom properties to use the luxury color palette: beige (#F5F0E8), ivory (#FFFFF0), white (#FFFFFF), gold (#C9A84C), and royal blue (#1B3A6B). Ensure Cormorant Garamond and Jost fonts are imported and set smooth scroll behavior on html element.

Update Tailwind config to define custom color tokens matching the luxury palette (beige, ivory, white, gold, royal-blue) and ensure font families reference Cormorant Garamond for headings and Jost for body text.

requirements.summary: Implement Home Page hero section with store name, tagline, CTA buttons, and full-width generated hero background image
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays 'Luxyle' and 'Elevating Spaces with Timeless Luxury' prominently
'Book Appointment' button smoothly scrolls to the appointment booking form
'Get Directions' button opens the provided Google Maps URL in a new tab
Hero banner uses the generated background image and fills the full viewport width

file_operations.description: Create a hero section component displaying 'Luxyle' as the store name, 'Elevating Spaces with Timeless Luxury' as the tagline, a 'Book Appointment' button that smoothly scrolls to the appointment booking section, and a 'Get Directions' button that opens https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Aditya+Cosmopolitan,+Nemawar+Rd,+near+Lakhani+Factory,+Indore,+Madhya+Pradesh+452001 in a new tab. Use frontend/public/assets/generated/luxyle-hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png as the background image with full viewport width coverage.
Replace the existing hero section implementation with the new HeroSection component at the top of the page composition.

requirements.summary: Add Featured Collections preview showing 4 curated images with link to full collection section
acceptanceCriteria: 4 collection images are displayed in a premium grid below the hero
'View Full Collection' link is present and scrolls to the full gallery section

file_operations.description: Create a component that displays a premium grid of 4 collection images (the first 4 from the 8 external URLs: https://img.sanishtech.com/u/f56125b1f2f52137b6f021abfd8fe562.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/d63b3f1566e29fe235b38438a157903f.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/d4418e844613722b5c6a9ca37c49d9c4.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/d7fe9528299bda266cc2b0f3ee5d5a32.jpeg) with a 'View Full Collection' link that smoothly scrolls to the full collection gallery section.
Add the FeaturedCollections component below the hero section in the page composition.

requirements.summary: Implement About Us section with exact brand story text, gold divider, and generated about image
acceptanceCriteria: The exact brand story text is displayed verbatim
Section has a gold decorative accent or divider
Layout is split between text and the about image

file_operations.description: Update the About Us section to display the exact brand story text: 'At Luxyle, we curate refined interior décor pieces that transform ordinary spaces into luxurious experiences. Every element is selected with attention to detail, elegance, and timeless design.' Add a decorative gold divider/accent element and update the layout to show frontend/public/assets/generated/luxyle-about.dim_800x600.png on one side with the text on the other in an elegant split layout.

requirements.summary: Build Collection Section with 8 external images in responsive grid with hover effects and lightbox
acceptanceCriteria: All 8 external image URLs are loaded and displayed in a grid
Hovering over an image triggers a smooth zoom or gold overlay effect
Clicking an image opens a lightbox with navigation between images
Grid is responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop

file_operations.description: Update the collection gallery to display all 8 external images in order: https://img.sanishtech.com/u/f56125b1f2f52137b6f021abfd8fe562.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/d63b3f1566e29fe235b38438a157903f.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/d4418e844613722b5c6a9ca37c49d9c4.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/d7fe9528299bda266cc2b0f3ee5d5a32.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/81f1aea60fd6fe9d51a12ba384647dd8.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/dfcd47f133fa1694f66376e81a3788ba.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/1803ea59e75d2d8b3b1baba29b3a51f5.jpeg, https://img.sanishtech.com/u/c240a10f7b62e426cd381343d3d3686b.jpeg. Implement a responsive premium grid layout with smooth zoom or gold overlay hover effects and a lightbox modal for fullscreen viewing with navigation controls.

requirements.summary: Display hardcoded existing feedback section with three 5-star reviews
acceptanceCriteria: All three reviews appear verbatim with correct attribution
Each review displays 5 gold star icons
Hardcoded reviews are always visible regardless of backend state

file_operations.description: Update the reviews section to ensure the three hardcoded reviews are always displayed: (1) 'Luxyle completely transformed my living space. The décor is elegant and premium.' – Priya S., (2) 'Exceptional quality and beautiful collection. Highly recommended!' – Rahul M., (3) 'Perfect place for luxury home décor in Indore.' – Neha K. Each review must show 5 gold star icons and the reviewer name. These hardcoded reviews should appear before any dynamically loaded approved feedback.

requirements.summary: Implement customer feedback submission form with name, star rating selector, and review text
acceptanceCriteria: Feedback form accepts Name, Rating (1–5 stars), and Review text
Submitted feedback is saved to the backend with a 'pending' status
Pending feedback does not appear in the public reviews section
Approved feedback appears in the reviews section dynamically

file_operations.description: Ensure the feedback form includes Name field, a 1–5 star rating selector, and Review text area. On submission, call the backend submitFeedback method (guest-accessible) to store feedback with 'pending' status. Display a thank-you confirmation message after successful submission.
Fetch and display approved feedback using the useGetApprovedFeedback hook from frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts alongside the hardcoded reviews. Ensure pending feedback is never displayed publicly.
Verify that useSubmitFeedback mutation and useGetApprovedFeedback query are correctly implemented to interact with the backend's submitFeedback and getApprovedFeedback methods.

requirements.summary: Implement appointment booking form with date picker, time slot selector, contact fields, and blocked date handling
acceptanceCriteria: Date picker disables all admin-blocked dates
Time slot selector is shown after a date is chosen
Form requires Name, Phone, Email, Message fields
Submitted appointments are stored and visible in the admin dashboard
Admin can change appointment status to approved, rejected, or blocked

file_operations.description: Update the appointment booking form to fetch blocked dates using useGetBlockedDates and disable them in the date picker. Display a time slot selector after a date is selected. Ensure the form includes Name, Phone, Email, and Message fields. On submission, call the backend submitAppointment method (guest-accessible) and display a success confirmation view.
Verify that useSubmitAppointment mutation and useGetBlockedDates query are correctly implemented to interact with the backend's submitAppointment and getBlockedDates methods.

requirements.summary: Build Contact Page with full address, embedded Google Map, contact form, Instagram link, and business hours
acceptanceCriteria: Full address is displayed on the contact page
A Google Maps embed is visible showing the store location
Contact form has Name, Email, and Message fields with a submit button
Instagram link is present and opens the correct profile
Business hours are clearly displayed

file_operations.description: Update the Contact Page to display the full store address 'Aditya Cosmopolitan, Nemawar Rd, near Lakhani Factory, Indore, Madhya Pradesh 452001', embed a Google Map iframe for the location, include a contact form with Name, Email, and Message fields, add the Instagram link to https://www.instagram.com/luxyleofficial?igsh=MTA3aTJqNzJtY2Z2ZQ== that opens in a new tab, and display business hours (e.g., Mon–Sat: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM, Sun: Closed).

requirements.summary: Implement sticky site header with logo, navigation links, Instagram icon, Book Appointment CTA, and mobile hamburger menu
acceptanceCriteria: Header is sticky and remains visible on scroll
Instagram icon in header links to the correct URL and opens in a new tab
Mobile hamburger menu collapses and expands navigation links
'Book Appointment' CTA button is visible in the header

file_operations.description: Update the header to be sticky/fixed at the top with the 'Luxyle' logo/wordmark, desktop navigation links (Home, Collection, About, Contact), an Instagram icon linking to https://www.instagram.com/luxyleofficial?igsh=MTA3aTJqNzJtY2Z2ZQ== that opens in a new tab, a 'Book Appointment' CTA button that scrolls to the appointment section, and a collapsible hamburger menu for mobile devices.

requirements.summary: Implement site footer with brand name, navigation links, services list, full address, Instagram icon, Get Directions button, and copyright text
acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays the store address verbatim
Instagram icon in footer links to the correct profile URL
'Get Directions' button opens the correct Google Maps link in a new tab
Copyright text reads '© 2026 Luxyle. All Rights Reserved.'

file_operations.description: Update the footer to include the Luxyle brand name/logo, quick navigation links, a services list, the full store address 'Aditya Cosmopolitan, Nemawar Rd, near Lakhani Factory, Indore, Madhya Pradesh 452001', an Instagram icon linking to https://www.instagram.com/luxyleofficial?igsh=MTA3aTJqNzJtY2Z2ZQ== that opens in a new tab, a 'Get Directions' button that opens https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Aditya+Cosmopolitan,+Nemawar+Rd,+near+Lakhani+Factory,+Indore,+Madhya+Pradesh+452001 in a new tab, and copyright text '© 2026 Luxyle. All Rights Reserved.'

requirements.summary: Implement admin dashboard with login protection, feedback management tab, and appointments management tab with blocked dates controls
acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard is accessible only after successful admin login
Feedback tab lists all pending submissions with approve/reject actions
Appointments tab lists all submitted appointments with status controls
Blocked dates can be added and removed from the admin interface
Status changes persist in the backend

file_operations.description: Update the admin dashboard to use the authorization component for authentication. Display the AdminLoginForm component until the user is authenticated as an admin (using isCallerAdmin check). Once authenticated, show tabbed UI with: (1) Feedback Management tab showing pending feedback with approve/reject actions using useApproveFeedback and useRejectFeedback mutations, and (2) Appointments Management tab showing all appointments with status update controls (approve/reject using useApproveAppointment and useRejectAppointment mutations) and a blocked dates manager (add/remove using useAddBlockedDate and useRemoveBlockedDate mutations).

Ensure the admin login form uses the authorization component to authenticate users. On successful login, check the user's role using isCallerAdmin. If the user is not an admin, display an access denied message.

Verify that admin-only query and mutation hooks (useGetAllFeedback, useGetPendingFeedback, useApproveFeedback, useRejectFeedback, useGetAllAppointments, useApproveAppointment, useRejectAppointment, useAddBlockedDate, useRemoveBlockedDate, useIsCallerAdmin) are correctly implemented to interact with the corresponding backend methods. Ensure proper error handling for authorization failures.
Ensure the admin route is registered and accessible from the navigation. Verify that the InternetIdentityProvider wrapper is present to enable authentication for the admin dashboard.

requirements.summary: Render generated hero and about images as static assets in their respective sections
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section background uses /assets/generated/luxyle-hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png
About Us section displays /assets/generated/luxyle-about.dim_800x600.png

file_operations.description: Ensure the hero section uses frontend/public/assets/generated/luxyle-hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png as the background image with proper styling for full-width coverage.
Ensure the About Us section displays frontend/public/assets/generated/luxyle-about.dim_800x600.png in the image portion of the split layout.
